hero.subtitle: Nigeria's most trusted property technology platform — connecting tenants, landlords, agents, and legal professionals across all 36 states and the Federal Capital Territory.

mission.heading: Transforming Nigeria's Rental Landscape
mission.paragraph_1: At RentalHub NG, we believe everyone deserves a safe, transparent, and hassle-free experience when finding a home. Our mission is to eliminate the friction, fraud, and frustration from the Nigerian rental market.
mission.paragraph_2: By combining technology with rigorous verification processes, legal support, and nationwide coverage, we empower tenants to find verified properties and landlords to connect with qualified tenants — all in one trusted ecosystem.

journey.heading: From Vision to Reality
journey.subtitle: Every great platform starts with a simple idea. Here is the story of how RentalHub NG grew from a vision into Nigeria's most trusted property marketplace.

values.heading: Our Core Values
values.subtitle: These principles guide every decision we make and every feature we build.

different.heading: What Makes RentalHub NG Different
different.subtitle: We don't just list properties — we build an end-to-end ecosystem for secure, transparent property transactions.

ecosystem.title: Verified Ecosystem
ecosystem.desc: Every landlord, tenant, and property goes through identity verification. Our superb verification system ensures only genuine participants on the platform.

legal.title: Legal Support & Dispute Resolution
legal.desc: Access to qualified lawyers, evidence verification, and structured dispute resolution processes to protect all parties.

marketplace.title: Full-Service Marketplace
marketplace.desc: Beyond rentals, we offer fumigation/cleaning services, transportation support, and virtual property tours — all in one platform.

coverage.title: Nationwide Coverage
coverage.desc: From Lagos to Maiduguri, Calabar to Sokoto — our platform serves all 36 states and the FCT with localized admin support.

team.heading: Meet Our Team
team.subtitle: Passionate professionals dedicated to transforming the Nigerian property experience.

member_1.bio: With over 15 years in real estate and technology, Zubair leads RentalHub NG with a vision to revolutionize property access in Nigeria.

member_2.bio: Chioma brings operational excellence from her background in property management and large-scale logistics coordination.

member_3.bio: Emeka architects the RentalHub NG platform, driving innovation in property tech, digital verification, and secure transactions.

member_4.bio: A seasoned legal professional, Fatima ensures that all property transactions comply with Nigerian law and protects all parties involved.

milestone.year_2020: RentalHub NG was founded with a vision to transform the Nigerian rental market.
milestone.year_2021: Launched property listing framework to onboard landlords across Lagos and Abuja.
milestone.year_2022: Expanded to all 36 states + FCT; introduced identity verification.
milestone.year_2023: Launched legal support services, dispute resolution, and fumigation/cleaning marketplace.
milestone.year_2024: Introduced transportation services, evidence verification, and virtual property tours.
milestone.year_2025: Reached 50,000+ active users; launched mobile app with real-time chat and notifications.

1.title: Trust & Verification
1.desc: Every landlord, property, and agent undergoes a rigorous verification process to ensure your peace of mind.

2.title: Fairness & Transparency
2.desc: Clear pricing, no hidden fees, and honest communication between all parties on our platform.

3.title: Community First
3.desc: We build a supportive ecosystem where tenants, landlords, agents, and legal professionals thrive together.

4.title: Nationwide Reach
4.desc: From bustling Lagos to serene rural areas, we connect people with homes across every region of Nigeria.

5.title: Integrity
5.desc: We uphold the highest ethical standards, ensuring every transaction and interaction is conducted with honesty.

6.title: Innovation
6.desc: Leveraging cutting-edge technology including property verification, digital evidence, and legal support tools.

cta.heading: Ready to Find Your Perfect Home?
cta.subtitle: Join over 50,000 Nigerians who trust RentalHub NG for their property needs. Browse verified properties, connect with trusted landlords, and enjoy peace of mind.

contact.heading: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions, feedback, or partnership ideas? We would love to hear from you.

toast.success: Reset link sent to your email

not_found.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

mobile_app.feature_instant_alerts_desc: Get notified when new properties match your search criteria.
mobile_app.feature_in_app_chat_desc: Message landlords and tenants directly from your phone.
mobile_app.feature_browse_properties_desc: Search, filter, and save your favourite listings on the go.
mobile_app.feature_legal_support_desc: Submit legal assistance requests and track case progress.
mobile_app.apk_desc: Download the APK and install it manually on your Android device.

privacy.body: Your data protection and privacy details go here.

terms.body: These terms govern use of the platform. Full legal text goes here.

hero.title: List Your Property on RentalHub NG
hero.subtitle: Reach thousands of verified tenants across Nigeria. List your property in minutes and start receiving qualified applications from genuine tenants.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Getting your property listed and in front of qualified tenants takes just a few steps.

benefits.title: Benefits of Listing on RentalHub NG
benefits.subtitle: Thousands of landlords and agents already trust us. Here is why.

step_1.title: Create Your Account
step_1.desc: Sign up as a landlord or agent and complete identity verification to get started.

step_2.title: Add Your Property
step_2.desc: Fill in property details, upload high-quality photos, and set your rental price.

step_3.title: Get Verified
step_3.desc: Your property undergoes verification to ensure authenticity. This builds trust with tenants.

step_4.title: Connect with Tenants
step_4.desc: Receive applications, chat with prospective tenants, and manage bookings — all from your dashboard.

benefit_1.title: Verified Tenant Pool
benefit_1.desc: All prospective tenants go through NIN-linked identity verification, so you know who you are dealing with.

benefit_2.title: Massive Exposure
benefit_2.desc: Your properties reach thousands of active tenants searching across all 36 states + FCT.

benefit_3.title: Smart Analytics
benefit_3.desc: Track views, inquiries, and applications in real-time with your landlord dashboard.

benefit_4.title: Easy Management
benefit_4.desc: Manage all your properties, applications, and tenant communication from one central dashboard.

benefit_5.title: Secure Payments
benefit_5.desc: Process rental applications, deposits, and subscription payments securely through the platform.

benefit_6.title: Dispute Protection
benefit_6.desc: Access legal support and structured dispute resolution if any issues arise with tenants.

testimonial_1.text: I listed my three-bedroom flat on RentalHub NG and had a qualified tenant within a week. The verification process gave me confidence.

testimonial_2.text: Managing multiple properties has never been easier. The dashboard is intuitive and my clients love the professional presentation.

testimonial_3.text: The legal support feature is a game-changer. I had a dispute resolved quickly without the usual stress.

faq_1.q: Who can list properties on RentalHub NG?
faq_1.a: Verified landlords and registered agents can list properties. You need to complete identity verification and be approved before listing.

faq_2.q: Is there a fee to list a property?
faq_2.a: We offer a free plan for a single basic listing. Paid plans start at N5,000 per listing per year with additional features and visibility.

faq_3.a: All tenants undergo NIN-linked identity verification before they can apply or contact you. This ensures you only deal with genuine, verified individuals.

faq_4.q: Can I list properties in multiple states?
faq_4.a: Yes! RentalHub NG covers all 36 states + FCT. You can list properties anywhere in Nigeria regardless of your location.

faq_5.a: Rental payments and deposits are handled directly between you and the tenant. The platform facilitates applications and secure communication.

faq_6.q: What if I need help with my listing?
faq_6.a: We offer email and WhatsApp support for all users. Premium plan users get dedicated agent support for personalized assistance.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Start with a free listing or unlock more features with our affordable paid plans.

testimonials.title: What Landlords Say
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied landlords who have found great tenants through our platform.

cta.title: Ready to List Your Property?
cta.subtitle: Join over 5,000 landlords and agents already using RentalHub NG to find qualified tenants. List your property today and start receiving applications.

contact.title: Need Help?
contact.subtitle: Our team is ready to help you get your property listed. Reach out anytime.

toast.needs_landlord_account: You need a landlord or agent account to list properties.

faq.hero_desc: Everything you need to know about RentalHub NG. Find answers to common questions about listing properties, finding rentals, verification, pricing, and more.

faq.contact_desc: Have a question that is not covered here? Our support team is always happy to help.

how_it_works.hero_desc: Whether you are looking for your next home or listing a property for rent, RentalHub NG makes the process simple, secure, and transparent.
how_it_works.walkthrough_signup_desc: Register as a tenant or landlord in under 2 minutes.
how_it_works.walkthrough_verify_desc: Complete NIN verification to unlock full access.
how_it_works.walkthrough_browse_desc: Tenants search, landlords list — both with powerful tools.
how_it_works.walkthrough_connect_desc: Apply, chat, and close your deal with confidence.
how_it_works.tenants_desc: From search to move-in, here is how tenants find their next home on RentalHub NG.
how_it_works.tenants_step_1_desc: Sign up as a tenant and complete your identity verification using your NIN. This ensures a safe community for everyone.
how_it_works.tenants_step_2_desc: Search through thousands of verified properties across all 36 states + FCT. Use filters to find exactly what you need.
how_it_works.tenants_step_3_desc: Make a one-time payment to unlock full property details, including the landlord contact information and premium media.
how_it_works.tenants_step_4_desc: Submit applications to your preferred properties, chat with landlords directly, and secure your new home.
how_it_works.divider_label: Both tenants and landlords use RentalHub NG
how_it_works.landlords_desc: From registration to tenant connection, here is how landlords succeed on RentalHub NG.
how_it_works.landlords_step_1_desc: Create a landlord or agent account and complete profile verification to start listing your properties.
how_it_works.landlords_step_2_desc: Add your property with detailed descriptions, high-quality photos, and set your rental terms.
how_it_works.landlords_step_3_desc: Select a listing plan that suits your needs — from free basic listings to premium featured placements.
how_it_works.landlords_step_4_desc: Review applications, chat with prospective tenants, and manage all your properties from one dashboard.
how_it_works.features_desc: These features ensure every interaction on RentalHub NG is safe and trustworthy.
how_it_works.features_verification_desc: Every user — tenant, landlord, and agent — goes through NIN-linked identity verification for a trusted ecosystem.
how_it_works.features_secure_desc: Applications and communications are handled securely within the platform. Clear terms protect all parties.
how_it_works.features_legal_desc: Access qualified lawyers, evidence verification, and structured dispute resolution when you need it.
how_it_works.features_ratings_desc: Transparent ratings and verified reviews help tenants and landlords make informed decisions.
how_it_works.faq_desc: Everything you need to know about using RentalHub NG.
how_it_works.cta_desc: Join thousands of Nigerians using RentalHub NG to find homes and list properties. Your journey starts here.
how_it_works.contact_desc: Our support team is always ready to help you navigate the platform.

pricing.hero_desc: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Start for free, upgrade when you are ready. No hidden fees, no surprises.
pricing.plans_heading: Choose the Right Plan for You
pricing.plans_desc: All plans include access to verified tenants, secure messaging, and landlord dashboard.
pricing.plan_free_desc: Get started with a basic listing and see what RentalHub NG has to offer.
pricing.plan_basic_desc: List multiple properties with enhanced visibility and dedicated support.
pricing.plan_premium_desc: Unlimited listings with premium placement, video tours, and dedicated agent support.
pricing.compare_desc: See exactly what each plan includes to make an informed decision.
pricing.addons_desc: Optional services to make your property stand out and attract more tenants.
pricing.addons_photo_desc: Professional photo shoot for your property with 20+ edited high-resolution images.
pricing.addons_video_desc: Professional video walkthrough of your property, edited and optimized for the platform.
pricing.addons_featured_desc: Boost your listing to the top of search results for 30 days with a featured badge.
pricing.addons_legal_desc: Professional legal review of your tenancy agreement and lease documents.
pricing.testimonials_desc: Join thousands of satisfied landlords who found the perfect plan for their needs.
pricing.faq_desc: Everything you need to know about our pricing and billing.
pricing.cta_desc: No credit card required. No risk. Join thousands of landlords who trust RentalHub NG to connect them with verified, quality tenants.
pricing.contact_desc: Our sales team is happy to help you find the perfect plan or create a custom enterprise solution for your portfolio.

landlord_guide.hero_desc: Everything you need to know about listing, managing, and renting your properties successfully on RentalHub NG — from preparation to tenant move-in.
landlord_guide.started_desc: Follow these steps to create a listing that attracts quality tenants quickly.
landlord_guide.prep_step_1_desc: Collect all necessary documents including proof of ownership, utility bills, property tax receipts, and any renovation permits.
landlord_guide.prep_step_2_desc: Ensure your property is in good condition before listing. Make necessary repairs, deep clean, and consider professional photography.
landlord_guide.prep_step_2_item_2: Deep clean all rooms and common areas
landlord_guide.prep_step_2_item_4: Stage rooms to look spacious and inviting
landlord_guide.prep_step_3_desc: Complete your landlord verification through RentalHub NG. This builds trust with potential tenants and increases your listing visibility.
landlord_guide.prep_step_4_desc: Create a compelling listing with detailed descriptions, high-quality photos, and competitive pricing. Share your listing across platforms.
landlord_guide.practices_desc: Proven strategies to help your property stand out and attract the right tenants.
landlord_guide.practice_1_desc: Write descriptive, honest titles that highlight key features.
landlord_guide.practice_1_tip_1: Mention exact room count and floor level
landlord_guide.practice_2_desc: Bright, well-lit photos from multiple angles dramatically increase inquiry rates.
landlord_guide.practice_2_tip_1: Shoot during daylight with good lighting
landlord_guide.practice_2_tip_2: Capture all rooms including kitchen and bathrooms
landlord_guide.practice_3_desc: Research comparable properties in your area before setting a price.
landlord_guide.practice_3_tip_1: Research 5+ similar listings in your area
landlord_guide.practice_3_tip_2: Factor in property condition and amenities
landlord_guide.practice_4_desc: Tenants appreciate fast responses. Aim to reply within 24 hours.
landlord_guide.practice_4_tip_1: Enable push notifications for new messages
landlord_guide.practice_4_tip_2: Set up auto-reply for common questions
landlord_guide.practice_5_desc: Remove listings once rented, update availability status promptly.
landlord_guide.practice_6_desc: Showcase your verified status, security features, and any safety certifications.
landlord_guide.protips_desc: Level up your landlord game with these expert insights.
landlord_guide.protip_1_desc: The first photo in your listing is the most important. Choose a bright, well-composed hero shot.
landlord_guide.protip_2_desc: Use RentalHub NG verification tools to confirm tenant identities before accepting applications.
landlord_guide.protip_3_desc: Always use legally reviewed tenancy agreements. RentalHub NG provides access to legal templates.
landlord_guide.protip_4_desc: Use your landlord dashboard to track views, inquiries, and application rates.
landlord_guide.protip_5_desc: Professional, responsive communication leads to positive reviews and referrals.
landlord_guide.protip_6_desc: Familiarize yourself with Nigerian tenancy laws in your state.
landlord_guide.mistakes_desc: Avoid these pitfalls to ensure a smooth and successful property listing experience.
landlord_guide.mistake_1_desc: Dark, blurry, or limited photos deter potential tenants.
landlord_guide.mistake_1_fix: Hire a professional photographer or use natural daylight and a quality smartphone camera.
landlord_guide.mistake_2_desc: Missing details about utilities, parking, or house rules leads to fewer applications.
landlord_guide.mistake_2_fix: Fill out all property fields completely.
landlord_guide.mistake_3_desc: Setting rent above market rate results in longer vacancies.
landlord_guide.mistake_3_fix: Research comparable listings in your area and price competitively.
landlord_guide.mistake_4_desc: Delayed responses frustrate tenants and make you appear unprofessional.
landlord_guide.mistake_4_fix: Set up notifications and aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours.
landlord_guide.faq_desc: Everything you need to know about listing on RentalHub NG.
landlord_guide.cta_desc: Join over 5,000 successful landlords on RentalHub NG. List your property today and start connecting with verified, qualified tenants across Nigeria.
landlord_guide.contact_desc: Our support team is here to help you every step of the way — from setting up your account to publishing your first listing.
